root_cause: Volume node affinity conflict prevents scheduling
evidence: Scheduler reports volume node affinity conflict

causes.message: PersistentVolumeClaim is bound to a PersistentVolume
PersistentVolume node affinity does not match available nodes
Scheduler cannot place Pod due to volume node affinity constraints

pod:volume-affinity-pod: PersistentVolume node affinity incompatible with node selection

likely_causes: PV is restricted to specific availability zones or nodes
Cluster nodes do not satisfy PV node affinity
PVC bound to a PV in a different zone than available nodes
